moves.name: identity-card
moves.executor: refcards with real photos, label mandatory

moves.name: atmosphere-shot
moves.executor: wan-t2v held clip, no text, music only

moves.name: stamp
moves.executor: Remotion SegmentCard on time jumps, with fade

rules: never two consecutive scenes of the same media class outside a sequence
every visual must read as footage, document, or reconstruction
name+role tag on every first-mention person
location+date stamp on every scene change
